name: Turnover-based Non-Assessed Exposures - Of which Exposures Financing Non-Assessed Non-Material Activities of Counterparties
businessDefinition: Turnover-based Proportion of Total Assets invested under Investment Firms' Activities dealing on own Account (as per Section A of Annex I to Directive 2014/65/EU) of which Exposures Financing Non-Assessed Non-Material Activities of Counterparties
